rules: body { background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); margin: 0px; }
#webgl { pointer-events: none; }
#ui-app { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; }
#ui { position: absolute; overflow: hidden; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; }
#monitor-videos { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; width: 0px; height: 0px; top: 0px; left: 0px; }
#css { cursor: pointer; }
#ui-interactive { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 256px; }
video { position: absolute; top: 0px; pointer-events: none; }
* { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }
html, body { overflow: hidden; }
.webgl { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; outline: none; }
.jitter { animation-duration: 0.3s; animation-timing-function: ease-in-out; animation-fill-mode: forwards; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-name: jittery; z-index: -10; }
.interface-wrapper { width: 100%; top: 64px; left: 64px; }
.icon-control-container { height: 26.5px; width: 26.5px; }
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, p { font-family: monospace; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; color: white; font-size: 16px; }
br { padding-top: 8px; padding-bottom: 8px; height: 16px; }
.loading::after { display: inline-block; animation: 1s steps(1) 0s infinite normal none running dotty; content: ""; }
.blinking-cursor { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 0.8em; height: 0.15em; animation: 0.65s step-end 0s infinite normal none running blink; }
.bios-start-button { background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-image: initial; border-width: 4px 3px; }
.bios-start-button p { box-sizing: border-box; padding: 8px; }
.bios-start-button:hover p { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); cursor: pointer; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); }
.loading-screen-header { padding: 48px; }
.loading-screen-body { padding-left: 48px; padding-right: 48px; }
.loading-screen-footer { padding: 48px 48px 64px; }
.info-wrapper { top: 64px; left: 64px; }
